recipe.title: Shrimp Creamy Lemon Garlic Pasta with Caesar Salad
steps: Cook pasta according to package, reserve 1/2 cup pasta water
Season shrimp with salt, pepper, garlic
Sauté shrimp in butter 2-3 min per side, set aside
Add cream to pan, simmer until thickened (3 min)
Stir in Parmesan, lemon juice, parsley
Toss with pasta, add shrimp. Thin with pasta water if needed.
- Romaine lettuce, Caesar dressing, croutons, Parmesan
